content_body: The Georgia Mountain Fairgrounds, located in Hiawassee, GA, is a premier destination for entertainment and cultural events in the North Georgia Mountains. Known for hosting the annual Georgia Mountain Fair, the fairgrounds offer a variety of events throughout the year, including concerts, craft shows, and festivals that celebrate the region's rich heritage. Visitors can enjoy live music from renowned artists, explore the historic Pioneer Village, and experience the vibrant atmosphere of the fairgrounds. With stunning lake and mountain views, the Georgia Mountain Fairgrounds provide a picturesque setting for family fun, making it a must-visit attraction for both locals and tourists.
title: Georgia Mountain Fairgrounds
